customErrors.description: prevents from creating a clinician contract with the same start date as an existing contract
customErrors.name: Same_contract_start_date_error
customErrors.label: Same start date error

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: There is already a contract for this clinician with the same Start Date. Please review and correct the Start Date.

Flow.description: PR1050558-4674 : Updates Hire Date to Contract Start Date when a new Executed Clinician Contract is created with a different Employment Type than a previously Executed contract. PR1050558-4748 :
Flow.label: Contract Before Save Flow
